arts.ttl: How will Barcelona replace injured Ter Stegen?
arts.sum: From a personal perspective, this is the second injury to the right knee that Ter Stegen has had to endure, and this one is far more serious than the first. For the time being it seems that Pena seens the only real choice until January, by which time Hansi Flick and his backroom team will have seen enough to know whether they’ll stick with the 25-year-old, or enter the market for Valles, Espanyol’s Joan García or any other custodian that could do a job for the club in their hour of need.
